chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4017 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho For order as to non-prosecution. ----------- Dated; 4th September 2023 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, as according to learned counsel, the purpose of filing instant petition has been served out. Be that as it may, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
